content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

December 20, 1990

John Moran, Assistant City Attorney  
Office of the City Attorney  
City of Stockton  
425 North El Dorado Street  
Stockton, CA 95202-1997

Re: Your Request for Confirmation of Telephone Advice  
Our File No. A-90-738

Dear Mr. Moran:

We have received your letter dated December 5, 1990, seeking written confirmation of telephone advice previously provided to you by this agency. You had sought advice on behalf of Councilmember Mel Panniza concerning the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 Your letter accurately reflects the advice provided to you.

You indicated that Councilmember Panniza owns a landscaping and gardening business, and provides landscape maintenance services under contract with a local homeowners association; that a member of the association's board of directors is a candidate for a city position which is filled by vote of the city council; and that the board member has never voted on the landscape contract with Councilmember Panniza, the contract having already been in effect when he assumed his position as a board member three years ago.

You were advised that Councilmember Panniza was not disqualified from participating in the decision to fill the position. This advice was premised on the understanding that the income he receives for his landscaping services was from the homeowners' association and not the individual members of its board of directors.

1 Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

I hope this letter has provided you with the guidance you requested. Please contact me if you have any further questions regarding this matter at (916) 322-5901.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

By: Jonathan S. Rothman
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:JSR:ken
